step_rationale: COX-1 catalyzes thromboxane-A2 synthesis; aspirin target; central to platelet amplification.
mechanism: Cyclooxygenase-1 catalyzes arachidonic acid conversion to thromboxane-A2, driving platelet recruitment and coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Restoring perturbed oxylipins with Danqi Tongmai Tablet attenuates acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology

references.title: Pharmacogenomics: a tool to prevent and cure coronary heart disease.

trials.title: International, Multicenter, Investigator-driven Randomized Clinical Trial to Assess the Single vs. Dual Antiplatelet Therapy in Elderly or HBR Patients Undergoing Percutaneous Intervention With Drug-coated Balloons (PICCOLETO IV-EPIC 38)
